creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'll leave a comment anyway:

FreeBSD supports the newer Intel wireless chipsets listed in the iwlwifi man page:
https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=iwlwifi&apropos=0&sektion=4&manpath=FreeBSD+15.0-CURRENT&arch=default&format=html

The wiki also has a list (possibly slightly older):
https://wiki.freebsd.org/WiFi/Iwlwifi/Chipsets

However, as the man page states, it does not support a lot of the (modern) features (yet).
